evidence: "Great documentary illuminating the plight of Pit Bulls and their owners."
"Touching, but predictable story about a comatose girl who can't decide whether to stay (alive) or go...."
"The ending of this movie kind of fell flat!"
"Movie was slow at times, but it seemed to create the mood for this time of life."
"Interesting theme, but the film dragged quite a bit."
"Tatiana is amazing as she plays all the characters."
"Tim Curry has a great voice and presence."
"Woody Allen makes great films, but should stay out of them."
"Love her music and costumes and sets....."
"Great movie. Brings the issue of animal cruelty perpetrated by scientists to the public's attention."
"The content brings you to tears at times, but it is important for people to realize how many wonderful pets are being slaughtered due to ignorance."
"Great movie. Brings the issue of animal cruelty perpetrated by scientists to the public's attention."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for documentaries and dramas, particularly those that evoke emotional responses and highlight social issues. They appreciate high production quality and tend to favor slower-paced narratives that create a mood, although they also enjoy engaging sensory experiences.
